canonical_definition: The model's internal, often linear, representation of abstract ideas, categories, or knowledge that allows it to process complex relationships beyond surface-level patterns.
papers: Beyond Single Concept Vector: Modeling Concept Subspace in LLMs with Gaussian Distribution
Concept-ROT: Poisoning Concepts in Large Language Models with Model Editing
